ItacPersonItem.Notes: Jurist. Joined the Ricovrati in 1619, and was Prince of the Academy in 1646. He taught `Instituta e Jus Cesareo` at the University. In 1633 he delivered a speech praising the heroic qualities of Podesta` Francesco Pisani.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
